title: Security-audit governance round: governance-bar consistency, restore manual cleanup entries, security-event batch acknowledge + auto retention
goal: Address the maintainer's security-audit review: (A) make governance-bar metrics consistent (drop DeptList metric description line, switch page-local success/failed counts to whole-filtered-set backend aggregates, admit /system/security-event); (B) restore the manual cleanup entries (GovernanceCleanupBar) on login-log/session/operation-log/security-event that were retired on 2026-07-19, per maintainer decision — auto retention stays primary, manual cleanup is the guarded secondary path — and throttle the login-log auto retention DELETE; (C) add security-event batch acknowledge and automatic retention so the table stops growing unbounded.

in: DeptList governance metrics: remove third description line, keep click-to-filter with visible affordance (CSS metric--action)

Backend list aggregates: login-log successCount/failedCount, operation-log successCount/failedCount, security-event pendingCount/acknowledgedCount/highSeverityCount over the whole filtered set; frontend hero stats consume them
Restore GovernanceCleanupBar component + barrel exports + --governance CSS (reverting the removal parts of 8ce624d8/3ca5b658)
Wire cleanup dialogs (retention-days + time-range modes) into the four audit pages behind system:*:clear permissions
Throttle ensureAutomaticLoginLogRetention with a 15-minute min interval; drop dead Runtime.lastCleanupAt
Security-event: POST /system/security-event/batch-acknowledge (SecureAction) + frontend row selection and batch-acknowledge modal
Security-event automatic retention: audit.security_event_retention_days (default 180, acknowledged-only) + retention options seed
i18n: batch-acknowledge and new setting keys across zh/en (+ fr/ja/ko overrides and runtime-fixes)
FRONTEND_PAGE_TEMPLATES.md: replace the 'no manual cleanup button' rule with the auto-primary/manual-secondary policy (maintainer decision 2026-07-20)
out: SearchToolbar advancedFilters popover: evaluated, kept as designed, no change

taskDoc: Maintainer review 2026-07-20 (chat): governance-bar redundancy on DeptList, missing quick cleanup on audit pages, security-event batch ops missing, filter popover consistency question. Assessment and plan recorded in project memory security_audit_assessment_2026_07_20.md.

executionRoles.implementerPosture: claude-direct (maintainer one-time exemption 2026-07-20 overriding the 'Claude does not implement' rule)

frontend: cd frontend && npm run test:smoke:system:governance (includes cleanup-range-ui.spec.ts as the behavior contract)

evidenceRequired: gate results (tsc, admission, ui-contract, shell-visual-contract, build)
go build + go test results for auth/audit/setting
visual evidence for the four audit pages with restored cleanup entries
humanGates: Maintainer decision 2026-07-20: restore manual cleanup entries (reverses the 2026-07-19 retirement recorded in FRONTEND_PAGE_TEMPLATES.md:164)
Maintainer one-time exemption 2026-07-20: Claude implements directly this round instead of delegating to Codex
